py-geopandas 0.6.1

graphics/py-geopandas: Update to 0.6.1

  * Update to 0.6.1. Small bug-fix release fixing a few regressions.

   https://github.com/geopandas/geopandas/releases/tag/v0.6.1


QA:

  * portlint: OK (looks fine.)
  * testport: OK (poudriere: 11, 12, HEAD. i386/amd64)

No need to merge-quarterly since py-geopandas is still in 0.5.1 in quaterly packages.
